channel.title: Software-Development on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Software-Development on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: commandline: How my dev machine built 1,111 word-processing features and forgot to add a ruler
item.description:
The piece describes an experiment where a complex agentic AI loop was used to build an online collaborative word processor, reflecting on the results and what emerged from letting the system run mostly on its own. The title suggests the system produced many features but still missed basic editor functionality like a ruler.

  • Source: Microsoft Command Line Blog

item.title: commandline: Introducing Command Line, and the new rules for builders
item.description:
Microsoft introduces a new “rules for builders” framing around agentic AI development, saying the traditional software development lifecycle is no longer sufficient. The post positions the guidance as a shift in workflows and mindset for building with AI agents.

  • Source: Microsoft Command Line Blog
